description: Measured throughput was 26.5 million group elements per second, using 8 NVIDIA B200 GPUs (80 GB HBM3e each, total 640 GB). Visited set validation: after BFS, a SHA256 checksum of the visited bitmask was 33ee2de1... (full value in experiment logs). Early termination was ruled out by verifying that all expected |SL₂(1021)| = 1,062,420,280 group elements were explored.
